scripts.render: tsx src/render.tsx specs/nebulift-app-flow.json output/nebulift-app-flow.svg && rsvg-convert -w 1600 -h 870 output/nebulift-app-flow.svg -o output/nebulift-app-flow.png
scripts.render:compact: tsx src/render.tsx specs/nebulift-app-flow-compact.json output/nebulift-app-flow-compact.svg && rsvg-convert -w 1280 -h 940 output/nebulift-app-flow-compact.svg -o output/nebulift-app-flow-compact.png
scripts.render:hub: tsx src/render.tsx specs/nebulift-decision-hub.json output/nebulift-decision-hub.svg && rsvg-convert -w 1600 -h 900 output/nebulift-decision-hub.svg -o output/nebulift-decision-hub.png
scripts.render:future: tsx src/render.tsx specs/nebulift-future-track.json output/nebulift-future-track.svg && rsvg-convert -w 1600 -h 980 output/nebulift-future-track.svg -o output/nebulift-future-track.png
scripts.render:all: npm run render && npm run render:compact && npm run render:hub && npm run render:future
